uk.updateNote: New information about Ebola screening when arriving in country (‘Entry requirements’ page).

regionalBreakdown.region: Republic of Congo-Central African Republic border area in Likouala Region

ie.updateNote: Following recent events concerning the Republic of Congo (also known as Congo-Brazzaville), Irish citizens are advised to exercise caution while in the country, with additional attention to personal safety required.
